column1: P1: ACTION/PROPS="Smiling softly, looking up at cherry blossoms" | TEXT="春ですね" P2: ACTION/PROPS="Catching a falling cherry blossom petal" | TEXT="綺麗" P3: ACTION/PROPS="Holding a pink parasol under the blossoms" | TEXT="お出かけ日和" P4: ACTION/PROPS="Sitting on a red bench, drinking tea" | TEXT="ほっと一息" P5: ACTION/PROPS="Waving hand with a bright smile" | TEXT="おはよう" P6: ACTION/PROPS="Closing eyes against the spring breeze" | TEXT="心地よい風" P7: ACTION/PROPS="Pointing at a beautiful cherry tree branch" | TEXT="見てみて" P8: ACTION/PROPS="Walking gracefully on a petal-covered path" | TEXT="行ってきます" P9: ACTION/PROPS="Looking affectionately at a single cherry blossom" | TEXT="ありがとう"

P1: ACTION/PROPS="Clapping hands excitedly" | TEXT="わぁ、満開" P2: ACTION/PROPS="Taking a selfie with cherry blossoms" | TEXT="記念撮影！" P3: ACTION/PROPS="Adjusting kimono collar gently" | TEXT="身嗜み" P4: ACTION/PROPS="Laughing with eyes closed" | TEXT="ふふふ" P5: ACTION/PROPS="Tying hair up while looking at flowers" | TEXT="さてと" P6: ACTION/PROPS="Holding hands out to feel the warmth" | TEXT="あたたかい" P7: ACTION/PROPS="Curious look, tilting head under the tree" | TEXT="どうしたの？" P8: ACTION/PROPS="Bowing politely" | TEXT="よろしくお願いします" P9: ACTION/PROPS="Waving goodbye gently" | TEXT="またね"

P1: ACTION/PROPS="Looking tired, wiping forehead" | TEXT="少し休憩" P2: ACTION/PROPS="Wiping tear from eye emotionally" | TEXT="感動しました" P3: ACTION/PROPS="Looking surprised with hand on cheek" | TEXT="びっくり" P4: ACTION/PROPS="Holding up an OK sign" | TEXT="了解です" P5: ACTION/PROPS="Nodding enthusiastically" | TEXT="うんうん！" P6: ACTION/PROPS="Looking regretful, hands together" | TEXT="ごめんなさい" P7: ACTION/PROPS="Hand on chest, relieved" | TEXT="よかった" P8: ACTION/PROPS="Offering a gentle smile" | TEXT="お疲れ様" P9: ACTION/PROPS="Looking up at the night cherry blossoms" | TEXT="おやすみなさい"

P1: ACTION/PROPS="Holding a bento box" | TEXT="お弁当" P2: ACTION/PROPS="Offering a cup of tea" | TEXT="お茶どうぞ" P3: ACTION/PROPS="Looking thoughtful, touching chin" | TEXT="うーん…" P4: ACTION/PROPS="Sparkling eyes, looking excitedly" | TEXT="楽しみ！" P5: ACTION/PROPS="Crossing arms gently, smiling" | TEXT="ふむふむ" P6: ACTION/PROPS="Hand covering mouth while laughing" | TEXT="おほほ" P7: ACTION/PROPS="Finger to lips gently" | TEXT="内緒ですよ" P8: ACTION/PROPS="Patting shoulder playfully" | TEXT="元気出して" P9: ACTION/PROPS="Cheering with a small fist pump" | TEXT="頑張って！"

P1: ACTION/PROPS="Walking briskly with purpose" | TEXT="急ぎます" P2: ACTION/PROPS="Stopping to tie obi ribbon" | TEXT="ちょっと待って" P3: ACTION/PROPS="Looking warmly, hands folded" | TEXT="いつもありがとう" P4: ACTION/PROPS="Sighing softly" | TEXT="ふぅ" P5: ACTION/PROPS="Looking proud with hands on hips" | TEXT="任せて！" P6: ACTION/PROPS="Giving a thumbs up" | TEXT="バッチリ" P7: ACTION/PROPS="Bowing deeply" | TEXT="感謝いたします" P8: ACTION/PROPS="Looking shy, looking down" | TEXT="照れますね" P9: ACTION/PROPS="Stretching arms out feeling good" | TEXT="いいお天気"

P1: ACTION/PROPS="Peeking from behind a cherry tree" | TEXT="ちらっ" P2: ACTION/PROPS="Jumping lightly with joy" | TEXT="やったー！" P3: ACTION/PROPS="Looking away, pretending not to notice" | TEXT="知らない" P4: ACTION/PROPS="Touching forehead, confused" | TEXT="あれれ？" P5: ACTION/PROPS="Hands on cheeks in awe" | TEXT="すごい！" P6: ACTION/PROPS="Pouting slightly" | TEXT="むー" P7: ACTION/PROPS="Wiping sweat with a handkerchief" | TEXT="あつあつ" P8: ACTION/PROPS="Holding stomach, laughing" | TEXT="お腹痛い" P9: ACTION/PROPS="Sleeping under the cherry blossoms gently" | TEXT="むにゃむにゃ"
